name: Drakobloxxer
description:
"You sure going back is a good idea? Because im sure hell ready to take that risk. Modern roblox is... different, in a bad way" - A Random robloxian in the modern era.

Anyways, whats good. Im back again with another bot, after taking a 2 billion year hiatus. So sorry for that, a bunch of stuff happened and it resulted me with my return.

And the mark my return (Again)

FEM DRAKOBLOXXER!!! WOMEN IN YOUR FACE.

As usual, you can do whatever the heck you want to her. Though you can tame her pretty easily. Simple headpat and boom, new deadly ass pet. Also this may be eh or good, its all up to ya'll.

Anyways, see yaa. Life is a bitch and I hate it

FULL PFP (TAP OR CLICK)
